# Monadic Program Analysis Providers

Pluggable analysis providers registered with ProgramAnalysis
and dispatched by sync wiring.

## ReadWriteSetProvider
Extracts the set of relations read and written by a program.
Used by CommutativityProvider and purity validation.

## CommutativityProvider
Determines whether two StoragePrograms commute:
`!(A.writes ∩ B.reads) && !(B.writes ∩ A.reads) && !(A.writes ∩ B.writes)`

## ParallelismProvider (Applicative Analysis)
Analyzes instruction dependency graphs to find independent
operations that can execute concurrently (Haxl/Stitch pattern).
Returns: layers, dependency edges, critical path, max parallelism,
speedup ratio.

## DeadBranchProvider
Identifies unreachable branches in a program's branch tree.

## InvariantExtractionProvider
Extracts properties suitable for formal verification.

## LensExtractionProvider
Extracts implicit lenses from get/put/del string-based access patterns.

## LensStructuralDiffProvider
Computes structural diffs between lens schemas for migration.

## VariantExtractionProvider
Extracts completion variant tags reachable from branch structure.
Enables dead-variant detection and sync coverage analysis.

## TransportEffectProvider
Extracts protocol:operation pairs from perform instructions.
Enables static verification that every transport effect has
a registered EffectHandler.
